text:
Once upon a time in a quiet village nestled among rolling hills, there lived an old oak tree. The villagers often gathered under its wide branches, listening to its wise tales. One chilly autumn day, a little girl named Lily climbed up to get a better look at the stars.

She liked to imagine that she could travel far away, just like her favorite fairy tales. As she drifted off into dreams, an owl hooted softly. Suddenly aware it was nighttime, she wondered how her parents would be up this early.

She peered down, hoping they’d be asleep. That’s when she saw a tiny glint. Must be a bird’s feather. Curiously, she reached down...

It was a seed. And from it, a baby bird was hatching. The owl had been her friendly roommate for weeks. Together, they’d watch stars and listen to stories.

Lily knew she had to help it. She retrieved a soft cloth and carefully placed it against the egg.
